Interface IPersistence

All Known Implementing Classes:
Datapersistance
public interface IPersistence
Defines the contract for persistence operations in the system. Provides CRUD operations for expenses, users, and budget cycles, as well as analytical queries for budgeting calculations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addExpense(expense expense)
    Adds a new expense to the database.
    void
    createBudgetCycle(BudgetCycle cycle)
    Creates a new budget cycle.
    void
    createUser(user user)
    Creates a new user in the system.
    void
    deleteExpense(int expenseId)
    Deletes an expense by its ID.
    List<expense>
    getAllExpenses()
    Retrieves all expenses from the database.
    BudgetCycle
    getCurrentCycle()
    Retrieves the currently active budget cycle.
    double
    getRemainingBalance()
    Calculates the remaining budget balance.
    long
    getRemainingDays()
    Calculates the number of remaining days in the current budget cycle.
    double
    getSafeDailyLimit()
    Calculates the safe daily spending limit based on remaining balance and days.
    double
    getTotalExpenses()
    Calculates the total amount of all expenses.
    Map<category,Double>
    getTotalExpensesByCategory()
    Retrieves total expenses grouped by category.
    user
    getUserById(int id)
    Retrieves a user by their ID.
    void
    lockUser(int userId)
    Locks a user account to prevent further actions.
    void
    updateCycle(double totalAllowance)
    Updates the total allowance of the active budget cycle.
    void
    updateExpense(int id, double newAmount)
    Updates the amount of an existing expense.

  • Method Details

    • addExpense

      void addExpense(expense expense)
      Adds a new expense to the database.
      Parameters:
      expense - the expense object to be stored

    • getAllExpenses

      List<expense> getAllExpenses()
      Retrieves all expenses from the database.
      Returns:
      a list of all stored expenses

    • deleteExpense

      void deleteExpense(int expenseId)
      Deletes an expense by its ID.
      Parameters:
      expenseId - the ID of the expense to delete

    • updateExpense

      void updateExpense(int id, double newAmount)
      Updates the amount of an existing expense.
      Parameters:
      id - the expense ID
      newAmount - the new amount value

    • createBudgetCycle

      void createBudgetCycle(BudgetCycle cycle)
      Creates a new budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycle - the budget cycle to create

    • getCurrentCycle

      BudgetCycle getCurrentCycle()
      Retrieves the currently active budget cycle.
      Returns:
      the active BudgetCycle, or null if none exists

    • updateCycle

      void updateCycle(double totalAllowance)
      Updates the total allowance of the active budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      totalAllowance - the new total allowance value

    • getTotalExpenses

      double getTotalExpenses()
      Calculates the total amount of all expenses.
      Returns:
      total spent amount

    • createUser

      void createUser(user user)
      Creates a new user in the system.
      Parameters:
      user - the user object to create

    • getUserById

      user getUserById(int id)
      Retrieves a user by their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the user ID
      Returns:
      the user object if found, otherwise null

    • lockUser

      void lockUser(int userId)
      Locks a user account to prevent further actions.
      Parameters:
      userId - the ID of the user to lock

    • getRemainingDays

      long getRemainingDays()
      Calculates the number of remaining days in the current budget cycle.
      Returns:
      remaining days in the cycle

    • getRemainingBalance

      double getRemainingBalance()
      Calculates the remaining budget balance.
      Returns:
      remaining amount of money

    • getSafeDailyLimit

      double getSafeDailyLimit()
      Calculates the safe daily spending limit based on remaining balance and days.
      Returns:
      recommended daily spending limit

    • getTotalExpensesByCategory

      Map<category,Double> getTotalExpensesByCategory()
      Retrieves total expenses grouped by category.
      Returns:
      a map where key is category and value is total spent amount
